[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 1110011100 6
2 0100010010 3
3 0110111101 7
4 0110100000 3
5 0000111100 4
6 1111100000 5
7 0000000000 a
